name: vscode-debug-bridge
description: Exposes the active VSCode debug session over a local HTTP API so an AI agent (Claude Code / Codex / any MCP client) can drive step debugging for any DAP debugger (Unity vstuc, Python, Node, C++, ...).

debugBridge.port.description: Localhost port the bridge HTTP server listens on. Use a distinct port per VSCode window if you debug multiple projects at once.
